content.en:
Chihe soon went to meet the patriarch of the White Shadow Elephant Clan, the Seven Blood Transformation Realm Moon Scars.

As a creature of the seven-time blood transformation realm, the strength of the moon mark is much more terrifying than that of Chihe, because the moon mark is a boundary-breaking genius.

A boundary-breaking seventh-time Blood Transformation Realm creature, its true combat power is comparable to that of a top-notch eight-time Blood Transformation Realm creature.

Therefore, the strength of the moon mark is very strong, so he can become the patriarch of the White Shadow Elephant clan.

"Patriarch, the Ancient Demon Ape Clan seems to have cultivated the Ancient Golden Blood in the Ancient Ruins!"

Chihe explained the situation carefully.

Moon Scar's face changed, "The Ancient Demon Ape Clan has really researched the Ancient Golden Blood, if it is true, the Ancient Demon Ape Clan will rise very quickly, in case they rely on the massive Ancient Golden Blood, plus a large number of clansmen continue to try to cultivate the Ancient Technique, if they are really lucky enough to practice and give birth to an Ancient Genius, it will not be good! Even if they can't practice it, they can use the Ancient Gold Blood to trade, and they can also develop themselves quickly." "

"Patriarch, I suggest going to the Ancient Ruins immediately and snatching the Ancient Golden Blood, preferably the Ancient Golden Blood cultivation method!" Chihe proposed.

"Hmm!"

Moonmark nodded.

"Let's go, come with me to the ancient ruins, and stay with some more people by the way. If it's true, just do it!" Moonmark ordered.

"Yes, Patriarch!"

Chihe answered.

......

Ancient ruins.

The primeval golden blood gradually stabilized, and the primeval demon ape who had changed the realm seven times was very excited at the moment, and only waited for the primeval realm blood to be completely stabilized, and then collected this piece of primeval golden blood.

With these primeval golden bloods alone, the efforts of the primeval demon ape clan for many years have not been in vain, and they can get more primeval golden blood in the future!

When he thought about it, he was excited.

Time passed slowly, the primeval golden blood gradually stabilized, and the light began to restrain itself.

"Almost!"

Seven Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Demon Ape Secret Dao.

That's when it happened.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying aura permeated, making the face of this seven-time Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Demon Ape change.

Click!

The void of the primeval ruins cracked, and a white figure appeared here.

"Moonscarred !!"

The Ancient Demon Apes were all shocked, the patriarch of the White Shadow Elephant Clan actually appeared here, this was enough to rival the existence of the top eight Blood Transformation Realms!

After the moon scar descended here, his eyes looked at the small golden lake, which was made up of primeval golden blood.

There are at least millions of drops of primeval gold blood here!

The point is that the other formations are still breeding the Ancient Golden Blood, but the time is not so fast, and it will take a long time to successfully evolve.

Then, he looked at the primeval monitor lizard that had been sealed here, and the information was correct.

"Ape Wilderness, hand over the primeval golden blood, and by the way, give me the cultivation method!"

Moon Scar said coldly.

"Moonmark, you're too shameless, aren't you, this is the territory of our Ancient Demon Ape Clan, you want to fight our Ancient Demon Ape Clan, right?" Ape Desolate said angrily.

At this moment, he didn't understand why Moon Scar was here.

The news that the primeval golden blood was successfully conceived is absolutely unknown to any foreigner!

Where did the moon scar get the news!

As soon as the primeval golden blood was conceived, the White Shadow Elephant clan got the news, as if an ancient demon ape had told the moon mark.

"If you don't give it, then don't blame me for being rude!"

Moonmark struck.

It's easy for him to deal with an ape wilderness, and the ape wilderness can't stop him.

Of course, he didn't dare to kill the Ape Wilderness, otherwise he would start a war with the Ancient Demon Ape Clan, and he couldn't afford that kind of consequences.

Rumble!!!!

Moonscar trampled down with one foot.

The body of the ape continued to grow larger, turning into the body of the primeval god and demon ape, and punched the moon mark.

However, the gap in strength between them is too great.

Rumble!!!!

Ape Huang was trampled down, his body continued to crack, and the injury was not light.

Then.

Moonmark's trunk stretched out towards the primeval lake of golden blood.

......

"I'll go, won't the Ancient Demon Ape Clan be unstoppable, my original intention was for them to fight, so that I can take the opportunity to get some benefits!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Just as Moonmark was about to ingest the primeval golden blood lake, an arm full of countless hairs slapped at Moonmark from the void.

Moonscar frowned, flicked his trunk, and collided with his opponent.

Bang!!!!!

The terrifying fluctuations seemed to directly shatter the surrounding fragments, but there were many formations here to protect it, coupled with the action of the Ancient Demon Ape in the dark, so it did not completely turn this place into ashes, but those formations were damaged, and the progress of nurturing the Ancient Golden Blood was about to stagnate.

Click!

Another primeval demon ape appeared.

"Ape Dragon, I didn't expect the Ancient Demon Ape Clan to even come to you!"

Moonmark Road.

The ape dragon is an eighth-time blood transformation realm creature of the primeval demon ape clan, and its strength is very strong.

"Moonmark, get out of here, this is where our primeval demon ape is. "

The ape dragon said angrily.

He had just arrived, and after knowing that the primeval golden blood had been conceived, he rushed over to prevent the news from leaking and causing a strong enemy.

As a result, there is a very low probability.

Bang!!!!

Moonmark and Ape Dragon are fighting.

And Chihe and the other White Shadow Elephants fought with the Ancient Demon Ape Clan, and the White Shadow Elephant Clan wanted to snatch the Ancient Golden Blood, but the Ancient Demon Ape Clan would not let them.

Suddenly, the place was in a mess, and there was incomparably chaotic.

"Bring the Ancient Golden Blood away, and get out of here!"

An Primeval Demon Ape commanded.

Suddenly, some primeval demon apes collected drops of primeval golden blood.

Since the Ancient Golden Blood was very heavy, and they were too weak, it was a bit troublesome to take them away, and they couldn't be taken away with a wave of their hand.

Therefore, many primeval demon apes came to collect the primeval golden blood, and then scattered and fled, which was able to save some of them.

After all, judging from the current situation, it seems that they can't beat the White Shadow Elephant Clan.

After all, the White Shadow Elephant Clan came prepared, and the Ancient Demon Ape Clan was completely unprepared!

Swish!

Ye Tian also went from the past, and then continued to collect drops of ancient golden blood in this primeval golden blood lake.

His cultivation is relatively low, so there will be no other primeval demon apes for him to resist attacks, so he can safely collect a drop of primeval golden blood.

It didn't take long for him to collect about 50,000 drops of Ancient Golden Blood, and he was ready to find an opportunity to escape with the other weaker Ancient Demon Apes.

"Run!"

An Ancient Demon Ape with six Blood Transformation Realms created an opportunity for many Ancient Demon Ape with four or five Blood Transformation Realms to escape.

Rumble!!!!

A group of white elephants was intercepted.

Many primeval demon apes fled immediately, and Ye Tian also fled, but he did not flee with the large army, but quickly separated.

And the other side.

Ye Tian sped up to copy a white image, and later, the white image copied the body and pretended to fight with the primeval demon ape's replica body, thus transferring the primeval golden blood.

After that, escape as a normal Blood Mutant creature.

In short, he's already planned!
